llm_response:
Subject: Request for Extension on Upcoming Project Submission

Dear Professor Smith,

I am writing to respectfully request a brief extension for the group project currently due in two days. I sincerely apologize for reaching out with this request so close to the submission time, as I understand the importance of adhering to all academic schedules. Unfortunately, unforeseen circumstances have made it difficult for our team to finalize the research phase by the original deadline. Specifically, one of our key team members fell ill suddenly yesterday, which prevented us from completing the necessary data analysis required for our final report. Without their immediate contribution, our current progress is significantly behind schedule, and we fear submitting incomplete work would not meet the high standards of your course.

We have already worked tirelessly to compensate for this loss and believe we can produce a high-quality submission if granted a few extra days. Extending the deadline would allow us to ensure our findings are accurate and our presentation is polished. We are committed to delivering our best possible work and would greatly appreciate your understanding regarding this unexpected challenge. Thank you for your time and consideration of our situation.

Sincerely,

Jordan Lee
Student ID: 12345678
